name: Technical Requirements Document

metadata.description: Defines the technical constraints, system integrations, infrastructure expectations, and technology considerations required to implement the functional requirements.

sections.title: Technical Overview
sections.purpose: Provide a summary of the technical approach for implementing the system.

sections.title: System Architecture Context
sections.purpose: Describe how the system fits within the broader enterprise architecture.

sections.title: Technology Stack Considerations
sections.purpose: Identify the programming languages, frameworks, and platforms considered or selected.

sections.title: System Integrations
sections.purpose: Describe integrations with internal or external systems.

sections.title: Data Requirements
sections.purpose: Define data handling expectations including storage, processing, and ownership.

sections.title: Security Requirements
sections.purpose: Define authentication, authorization, data protection, and compliance requirements.

sections.title: Performance Requirements
sections.purpose: Describe expected system performance characteristics such as response times and throughput.

sections.title: Scalability Requirements
sections.purpose: Define expectations for system scalability under increasing load.

sections.title: Availability Requirements
sections.purpose: Specify uptime expectations and resilience requirements.

sections.title: Deployment Requirements
sections.purpose: Define expectations for environments, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment processes.

sections.title: Monitoring and Observability
sections.purpose: Define logging, monitoring, tracing, and alerting expectations.

sections.title: Technical Constraints
sections.purpose: Identify technical limitations imposed by infrastructure, tools, or organizational policies.

sections.title: Technical Assumptions
sections.purpose: Document assumptions related to the technical implementation.

sections.title: Technical Dependencies
sections.purpose: Identify dependencies on external platforms, services, or infrastructure.

sections.title: Approval and Sign Off
sections.purpose: Capture formal approval of the technical requirements.

validationRules: All integrations must reference a functional requirement from the FRD.
Security requirements must align with organizational security policies.
Performance requirements must align with NFR expectations.
Technical constraints must not contradict defined architecture assumptions.

promptHints.systemIntent: Generate a technical requirements document describing the technical expectations and constraints for implementing the functional requirements.
rules: Do not introduce functional requirements not defined in the FRD.
Avoid describing detailed architecture design; focus on technical expectations.
Ensure integration points align with functional workflows.
Ensure all technical requirements support functional behavior defined in the FRD.
